text.title: Research Workflows Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Research Workflows methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: classify-mode
step.action: Map goal to one of 8 canonical modes.
step.decision-gate: Refuse modes outside the canonical set.

step.name: compose-steps
step.action: Sequence 1-6 methodologies; name artefact per step.

step.name: attach-acceptance
step.action: Per step, write acceptance criterion (artefact present + validator pass).

step.name: audit
step.action: Validate against schema; reject if any rule fails.
step.decision-gate: If audit fails, fix and re-run.
